label: Wait (pause N seconds)
description: Pauses the test for a fixed number of seconds — handy between actions (e.g. after a reboot).

label: Print a message to the log
description: Writes a message into the run log — useful as a checkpoint marker.

label: Assert a previous step's output contains text
description: Passes only if a referenced earlier step's output contains the expected text.

label: Run inline Python (paste code)
description: Runs a snippet of Python you paste in — no script file needed.

label: Run inline PowerShell (paste code)
description: Runs a snippet of PowerShell you paste in — no script file needed.

label: Run a script file with arguments
description: Runs a local script file (e.g. python my.py a b) and captures its output.
